info.title: Saqib Express API
info.description: Auth and provider onboarding APIs for customer, service provider, event provider, and venue provider.

OnboardingRequest.description: Send exactly one profile object among serviceProvider, eventProvider, or venueProvider.

ServiceProviderServiceUpdateRequest.description: Partial update. Send only fields you want to change.

message.example: User registered successfully. OTP sent to email for verification.

post.summary: Register user and send verification OTP

example.message: If an account exists for this email, a reset OTP has been sent.
